records.question: Which organisations have details exactly impedit, with grants that have other details exactly occaecati, a grant amount exactly 281.2446, starting on or before 1985-10-09 20:08:49 and ending on or after 1985-06-08 00:22:07, projects where the project details are non, and research staff where the staff details are dolor?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT organisations.organisation_id FROM organisations
JOIN grants ON organisations.organisation_id = grants.organisation_id
JOIN projects ON organisations.organisation_id = projects.organisation_id
JOIN research_staff ON organisations.organisation_id = research_staff.employer_organisation_id
WHERE grants.grant_start_date <= '1985-10-09 20:08:49' AND grants.other_details = 'occaecati' AND projects.project_details = 'non' AND grants.grant_end_date >= '1985-06-08 00:22:07' AND organisations.organisation_details = 'impedit' AND grants.grant_amount = 281.2446 AND research_staff.staff_details = 'dolor'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.organisation_id FROM Organisations AS T1 INNER JOIN Grants AS T2 ON T1.organisation_id = T2.organisation_id INNER JOIN Projects AS T3 ON T1.organisation_id = T3.organisation_id INNER JOIN Research_Staff AS T4 ON T1.organisation_id = T4.employer_organisation_id WHERE T1.organisation_details = 'impedit' AND T2.other_details = 'occaecati' AND T2.grant_amount = 281.2446 AND T2.grant_start_date <= '1985-10-09 20:08:49' AND T2.grant_end_date >= '1985-06-08 00:22:07' AND T3.project_details = 'non' AND T4.staff_details = 'dolor'

records.question: Which organisations have grants and projects where the project details are exactly "et"?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT organisations.organisation_id FROM organisations
JOIN grants ON organisations.organisation_id = grants.organisation_id
JOIN organisation_types ON organisations.organisation_type = organisation_types.organisation_type
JOIN projects ON organisations.organisation_id = projects.organisation_id
WHERE projects.project_details = 'et'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.organisation_id FROM Organisations AS T1 INNER JOIN Grants AS T2 ON T1.organisation_id = T2.organisation_id INNER JOIN Projects AS T3 ON T1.organisation_id = T3.organisation_id WHERE T3.project_details = 'et'

records.question: Which organisations have grants ending exactly '1996-08-16 20:45:05' with an amount at least 608413.3291, have organisation details exactly 'eius', and are also associated with organisation types and have research staff employed?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT organisations.organisation_id FROM organisations
JOIN grants ON organisations.organisation_id = grants.organisation_id
JOIN organisation_types ON organisations.organisation_type = organisation_types.organisation_type
JOIN research_staff ON organisations.organisation_id = research_staff.employer_organisation_id
WHERE grants.grant_end_date = '1996-08-16 20:45:05' AND grants.grant_amount >= 608413.3291 AND organisations.organisation_details = 'eius'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.organisation_id FROM Organisations AS T1 INNER JOIN Grants AS T2 ON T1.organisation_id = T2.organisation_id INNER JOIN Research_Staff AS T3 ON T1.organisation_id = T3.employer_organisation_id WHERE T2.grant_end_date = '1996-08-16 20:45:05' AND T2.grant_amount >= 608413.3291 AND T1.organisation_details = 'eius'

records.question: Which organisations have details exactly tenetur, have projects with details exactly dolorem, employ research staff with details exactly consequatur, and received grants that started on 1986-10-31 17:11:29, ended on or after 2001-05-22 21:02:43, and have an amount at most 610.7004?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT organisations.organisation_id FROM organisations
JOIN grants ON organisations.organisation_id = grants.organisation_id
JOIN organisation_types ON organisations.organisation_type = organisation_types.organisation_type
JOIN projects ON organisations.organisation_id = projects.organisation_id
JOIN research_staff ON organisations.organisation_id = research_staff.employer_organisation_id
WHERE projects.project_details = 'dolorem' AND organisations.organisation_details = 'tenetur' AND grants.grant_start_date = '1986-10-31 17:11:29' AND grants.grant_end_date >= '2001-05-22 21:02:43' AND research_staff.staff_details = 'consequatur' AND grants.grant_amount <= 610.7004
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.organisation_id FROM Organisations AS T1 JOIN Projects AS T2 ON T1.organisation_id = T2.organisation_id JOIN Research_Staff AS T3 ON T1.organisation_id = T3.employer_organisation_id JOIN Grants AS T4 ON T1.organisation_id = T4.organisation_id WHERE T1.organisation_details = 'tenetur' AND T2.project_details = 'dolorem' AND T3.staff_details = 'consequatur' AND T4.grant_start_date = '1986-10-31 17:11:29' AND T4.grant_end_date >= '2001-05-22 21:02:43' AND T4.grant_amount <= 610.7004

records.question: Which organisations have grants with other details set to aliquam and are also associated with projects, research staff, and have organisation types?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT organisations.organisation_id FROM organisations
JOIN grants ON organisations.organisation_id = grants.organisation_id
JOIN organisation_types ON organisations.organisation_type = organisation_types.organisation_type
JOIN projects ON organisations.organisation_id = projects.organisation_id
JOIN research_staff ON organisations.organisation_id = research_staff.employer_organisation_id
WHERE grants.other_details = 'aliquam'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.organisation_id FROM Organisations AS T1 INNER JOIN Grants AS T2 ON T1.organisation_id = T2.organisation_id INNER JOIN Projects AS T3 ON T1.organisation_id = T3.organisation_id INNER JOIN Research_Staff AS T4 ON T1.organisation_id = T4.employer_organisation_id INNER JOIN Organisation_Types AS T5 ON T1.organisation_type = T5.organisation_type WHERE T2.other_details = 'aliquam'

records.question: Which organisations have details exactly impedit, are involved in projects where the details is deleniti, and received grants with other details exactly occaecati, a start date on 1985-10-09 20:08:49, an end date on 1985-06-08 00:22:07, and an amount at least 281.2446?

SELECT organisations.organisation_id FROM organisations
JOIN grants ON organisations.organisation_id = grants.organisation_id
JOIN projects ON organisations.organisation_id = projects.organisation_id
WHERE organisations.organisation_details = 'impedit' AND grants.grant_end_date = '1985-06-08 00:22:07' AND projects.project_details = 'deleniti' AND grants.grant_start_date = '1985-10-09 20:08:49' AND grants.grant_amount >= 281.2446 AND grants.other_details = 'occaecati'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.organisation_id FROM Organisations AS T1 INNER JOIN Projects AS T2 ON T1.organisation_id = T2.organisation_id INNER JOIN Grants AS T3 ON T1.organisation_id = T3.organisation_id WHERE T1.organisation_details = 'impedit' AND T2.project_details = 'deleniti' AND T3.other_details = 'occaecati' AND T3.grant_start_date = '1985-10-09 20:08:49' AND T3.grant_end_date = '1985-06-08 00:22:07' AND T3.grant_amount >= 281.2446

records.question: Which organisations have organisation details exactly equal to eius and are associated with both grants and research staff?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT organisations.organisation_id FROM organisations
JOIN grants ON organisations.organisation_id = grants.organisation_id
JOIN research_staff ON organisations.organisation_id = research_staff.employer_organisation_id
WHERE organisations.organisation_details = 'eius'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.organisation_id FROM Organisations AS T1 WHERE T1.organisation_details = 'eius' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM Grants AS T2 WHERE T2.organisation_id = T1.organisation_id ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM Research_Staff AS T3 WHERE T3.employer_organisation_id = T1.organisation_id )

records.question: What organisations have organisation details exactly equal to et, with staff whose staff details is quo and projects where project details is beatae?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT organisations.organisation_id FROM organisations
JOIN projects ON organisations.organisation_id = projects.organisation_id
JOIN research_staff ON organisations.organisation_id = research_staff.employer_organisation_id
WHERE research_staff.staff_details = 'quo' AND projects.project_details = 'beatae' AND organisations.organisation_details = 'et'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.organisation_id FROM Organisations AS T1 INNER JOIN Research_Staff AS T2 ON T1.organisation_id = T2.employer_organisation_id INNER JOIN Projects AS T3 ON T1.organisation_id = T3.organisation_id WHERE T1.organisation_details = 'et' AND T2.staff_details = 'quo' AND T3.project_details = 'beatae'
